<text color="C1D3FF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Zombies, ghouls and punk rockers.</>

ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="C1D3FF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Zombies, ghouls and punk rockers.</>
Calling everyone to the stage with the Ghoul Punk Pack, featuring:

DisclaimerText.SourceString:
Challenges unlocked after having completed the "Homebase Stormshield Defense 3" mission in "Save the World" Campaign.

V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items in the Shop for Fortnite Battle Royale, LEGO® Fortnite, Fortnite Festival or Rocket Racing, as well as additional content like this season's Battle Pass!
